items.name: Blue Gold Left Shoulder 2000s Arm Band Bracelet
items.description:
Bring back the bold with a 2000s left shoulder armband bracelet — the ultimate Y2K power move. Sleek metallics, rhinestone details, and that iconic asymmetrical edge made this the go-to statement for pop princesses and street style stars alike. Perfect for crop tops, low-rise jeans, and making every outfit a little more unforgettable.

Made by Nymphe and Mor

items.name: Glitch Atomic
items.description: a few years ago, G.U.N. attempted to create another being like atomic. they planned for months and when they finaly finnished him, sumone messed up a few coordinates, so there was a slight glitch in this atomic's DNA. he came out with no pupils, his spines standing up, and controls only dark chaos energy. he isnt evil, but isnt what you would call good either.
